# phala_regions (Data Source)

Lists Phala Cloud regions, similar to DigitalOcean regions.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `regions` (Attributes List) Region catalog. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--regions))

<a id="nestedatt--regions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `regions`

Read-Only:

- `available` (Boolean)
- `name` (String)
- `slug` (String)
